scripts.audit:site: npm run audit:html && npm run audit:seo
scripts.publish:prep: mkdir -p publish && rsync -av --delete --exclude='publish/***' --exclude='.git/***' --exclude='.github/***' --exclude='.claude/***' --exclude='.projects/***' --exclude='.netlify/***' --exclude='node_modules/***' --exclude='scripts/***' --exclude='__pycache__/***' --include='*/' --include='*.html' --include='*.css' --include='*.js' --include='*.xml' --include='*.txt' --include='*.ico' --include='*.png' --include='*.jpg' --include='*.jpeg' --include='*.svg' --include='images/***' --exclude='*' ./ publish/ && rsync -av --delete ./netlify/functions/ publish/netlify/functions/
